svg.text: What the user says → What AI extracts → What to ask
Confirm card, then log. No questions.
"coffee and sandwich for lunch, thirty bucks total"
❌ Single amount for two items: Can't split
❌ Name unclear: "Coffee and sandwich" or one tx?
Show card: "Detected multiple items. Log as
Ask: "How much did the Uber cost?"
User can say "groceries" or pick from recent
"paid the rent, two thousand five hundred"
⚠ Recurring: Probably monthly, but not explicit
"dinner with sarah, sixty bucks, my share was thirty"
Log $30. Show: "You owe Sarah $30 for dinner?"
"grocery shopping at whole foods, one hundred twenty"
Show auto-tag rule learned: "Next time you
"fifty on gas, then spent thirty-five on target"
"birthday gift for mom, not sure how much yet"
Ask: "How much was the gift? You can update
later if you're not sure." Show skeleton with
estimated amount or let them leave blank for now.
